Nanjing Lianchuang Technology Group Co., Ltd. represents a classic evolution of a late-90s IT enterprise. Originally established in 1997 as a system integration company ('Nanjing Lianchuang System Integration Co., Ltd.'), it has matured into an unlisted corporate group with nearly 119 million RMB in fully paid-in capital. Despite its classification under 'Computer Manufacturing', its 50 insured employees indicate it functions as an asset-light corporate headquarters or holding entity rather than a direct manufacturing facility. Its business scope clearly points toward IT services, software development, and network engineering. Furthermore, the inclusion of 'self-owned property leasing' and 'advertising' suggests a diversified corporate group structure that monetizes its technology park real estate alongside its core software and integration legacy.
